assets.note: STE-46: self-issued testnet assets (codes USDC/EURC) wrapped as SAC for a deterministic demo — NOT real Circle USDC/EURC. The issuer SECRET is backend-only (faucet POST /faucet, STE-45); it is never committed here — only the issuer public key is recorded.

pools.note: STE-46: mock_pool test-doubles, one per currency (real Blend testnet rejects non-Circle assets, so the demo uses these; real Blend is post-hackathon). Each is init'd with its SAC, allowlisted, and set as the bucket's configured pool. Recorded under the BLEND_POOL_* env names the backend/deploy.ts already read.

yieldPools.note: U5: real accruing yield_pool (contracts/yield_pool), one per currency, deployed + allowlisted + set as the bucket's configured pool. Additive rate-index accrual at 1000 bps (10%), read on-chain as rate_bps() — the display APY is this number, not a hardcoded catalog constant. Backed by the YIELD_POOL_<CCY> env names (buildPoolRegistry falls back to legacy BLEND_POOL_*). Recorded here; the SoroSense pool is the keeper's demo allocation target (slug sorosense-usd/sorosense-eur).

liveSmokeTest.note: rate_bps() reads 1000 on both pools. Funded the USD pool with 500 USDC surplus (issuer mint, R11 — liquidity() reads 5000000000) so it can pay accrued interest on withdrawal. Keeper allocated 1200 USDC of idle USD into the USD pool (tx 473d8ad92e52f3d9ca247fa5145bbd0efffca5d09ae289f9ce8206ff4739dcd4); active_pool(Usd) then reads the pool, not null. share_price(Usd) rose 1000000063 → 1000000443 and pool.balance(vault) 12000000761 → 12000005327 across a ~2-minute window — the mark-to-market NAV lift, live, with no poke.
liveSmokeTest.eur: EUR seeded too: demo depositor added the EURC trustline, faucet-minted 1000 EURC, deposited it, the EUR pool was funded with 500 EURC surplus, and the keeper allocated 1000 EURC (tx c511b662c8af6ffd31789b6c2637757a80c86df92990a51a73f56a2c121b4f54). active_pool(Eur) reads the pool, share_price(Eur) rose above 1000000000, EUR pool liquidity 15000000000.

faucetSmokeTest.note: STE-46 verification: minted 1000 USDC to a trustline'd account, then deposit(100 USDC) into the vault succeeded live (no zero-balance panic). SAC transfer + vault Deposit event fired; balance_of and value_of both read 1000000000.

notes: Upgradable vault (admin-governed `upgrade(new_wasm_hash)`; storage preserved). Deployed + verified live: consent write/read smoke test AND a live on-chain upgrade tx both succeeded. Per-currency tokens + pools (set_token/set_pool_allowed/set_configured_pool) are wired (STE-46) with self-issued USDC/EURC SACs + mock_pool test-doubles for a deterministic demo; real Blend is post-hackathon. Upgrade should move behind a timelock/multisig before mainnet (deferred). Testnet resets ~quarterly — redeploy via scripts/deploy.ts.

upgrades.note: STE-31 (earn-history U2): adds the read-only NAV views `share_price(currency)` and `value_of(user,currency)`. Same contract id, storage preserved. Verified live post-upgrade: all three buckets price at 1000000000 (SHARE_PRICE_SCALE, the empty-bucket base) and `value_of` reads 0. Yield never accrues on-chain yet — `total_assets` moves only on deposit/withdraw — so `share_price` stays at the base scale until mark-to-market NAV ships.

STE-51: emit `ConsentSet { depositor }` on the first `set_policy_consent` (absent→set), so the one-time safety mandate becomes a derivable "Yours" activity row like AutoCompoundSet. Emitted once — a re-call is a silent no-op. Same contract id, storage preserved. Verified live: tx 4b41fdf0154f12a8161930e3f0dd738a394f09236be870d6cbc17aaeea52b6f8 emitted `Event: ConsentSet (consent_set)` and has_consent read true.

Mark-to-market NAV (U2): `share_price = (nav+V)·SCALE/(TS+V)` where `nav(ccy) = idle + Σ_{p∈PoolList} pool.balance(vault)`, so once a bucket is allocated into an accruing yield_pool its price rises with ledger time — no poke. Storage preserved; upgrade done FIRST and verified inert (pre-flight: active_pool(Usd/Eur) null, share_price(Usd) exactly 1000000000). Post-upgrade binver reads 1.3.0. Then allocated 1200 USDC into the USD yield_pool and watched it move: share_price(Usd) 1000000063 → 1000000443 minutes apart (the number that had never moved since deploy), pool.balance(vault) 12000000761 → 12000005327. See yieldPools below.
